creator: j@nitrology.com
text:
Testing this new version spits this out on startup (The minion to function without despite the unknown call failing)

Exception TypeError: "'NoneType' object is not callable" in <function _removeHandlerRef at 0x8056fd050> ignored

This is surely an upstream issue, but it seems to be something isolated to FreeBSD.  If I can root it out we can hopefully fix it upstream, but I just wanted to note it here on the off chance we need to maintain a patch before this is pushed.
